program.name: Atlas Platform Launch
program.description: Fictional B2B SaaS launch program — the hybrid bridge demo. One program, three projects spanning agile, waterfall, and hybrid delivery.

risks.title: Cross-team dependency stalls the critical path
risks.description: Platform Core API delays ripple into Migration and then the public launch.

risks.title: Program budget pressure
risks.description: A contractor rate increase threatens the back half of the program.

risks.title: Regulatory sign-off gates billing + cutover
risks.description: A compliance review must clear before billing go-live and the production cutover.

risks.title: Third-party security audit findings on SSO
Executive sponsor transition mid-program
risks.notes: New sponsor onboarded; launch funding reconfirmed.

projects.name: Platform Core
projects.description: The agile build stream — the platform itself, delivered sprint by sprint.

risks.title: Velocity dip after team expansion
risks.description: Onboarding three new engineers mid-program may dip velocity for 2 sprints.

risks.title: Billing scope creep
risks.description: Tax-engine requirements are still firming up and may expand the billing epic.

risks.title: SSO/identity vendor integration risk
risks.description: The chosen IdP's enterprise SSO certification is on the critical path.

risks.title: Notification provider rate limits
risks.notes: Batching + backoff implemented; load test passed.

projects.name: Migration Tooling
projects.description: The waterfall stream — CPM-scheduled data migration with three-point estimates.

risks.title: Legacy data quality worse than profiled
risks.description: Undocumented nulls and encoding issues could expand the transform effort.

risks.title: Cutover window too short
risks.description: The approved freeze window may not absorb a failed first cutover.

risks.title: Migration throughput below target
risks.description: Delta-sync throughput may not keep pace with production write volume.

risks.title: No tested rollback for a failed cutover
risks.description: A failed production cutover without a rehearsed rollback strands the migration.

projects.name: GTM Readiness
projects.description: The hybrid stream — gated launch planning with agile enablement content.

risks.title: Launch slips past fiscal quarter
risks.description: A migration slip cascades to the public-launch milestone and misses the quarter.

risks.title: Analyst-briefing embargo conflict
risks.notes: Embargo dates aligned with the launch gate; closed.
